title: Selling Lies (feat. Ilho Cho)
description: A powerful anthem that unmasks the deception and greed of the modern world with crushing sound.

title: Victories (feat. Insane Divinity)
description: A high-octane celebration of triumph, blending crushing riffs with an unyielding spirit of victory.

title: Overdozem
description: A high-octane heavy metal journey that pushes the limits of speed and intensity.

title: Hell Brawl
description: A thunderous clash of riffs and rhythms that echoes the chaos of a true underworld battle.

title: Morphine Flight
description: A powerful and energetic riff that blends the power of psychedelics with the thrill of aerial maneuvers.
